GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [i_product_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[i_product_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_product_name], aggr=[]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6100805
        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_product_name@0], 8), input_partitions=8
          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_product_name], aggr=[]
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6100805
              GpuFilterExec: predicate=CASE WHEN __always_true@2 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE item_cnt@1 END > 0, projection=[0]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6100805
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Left, on=[(i_manufact@0, i_manufact@1)], projection=[1, 2, 4]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6100805
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_manufact@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6100805
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=i_manufact_id@0 >= 738 AND i_manufact_id@0 <= 778, projection=[1, 2]
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=6100805
                    GpuProjectExec: expr=[count(*)@1 as item_cnt, i_manufact@0 as i_manufact, true as __always_true]
                      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_manufact], aggr=[count(*)]
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6100805
                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_manufact@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_manufact], aggr=[count(*)]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6100805
                                GpuFilterExec: predicate=__common_expr_5@0 AND ((i_color@4 = powder OR i_color@4 = khaki) AND (i_units@5 = Ounce OR i_units@5 = Oz) AND (i_size@3 = medium OR i_size@3 = extra large) OR (i_color@4 = brown OR i_color@4 = honeydew) AND (i_units@5 = Bunch OR i_units@5 = Ton) AND (i_size@3 = N/A OR i_size@3 = small)) OR i_category@1 = Men AND (i_color@4 = floral OR i_color@4 = deep) AND (i_units@5 = N/A OR i_units@5 = Dozen) AND i_size@3 = petite OR i_category@1 = Men AND (i_color@4 = light OR i_color@4 = cornflower) AND (i_units@5 = Box OR i_units@5 = Pound) AND (i_size@3 = medium OR i_size@3 = extra large) OR __common_expr_5@0 AND ((i_color@4 = midnight OR i_color@4 = snow) AND (i_units@5 = Pallet OR i_units@5 = Gross) AND (i_size@3 = medium OR i_size@3 = extra large) OR (i_color@4 = cyan OR i_color@4 = papaya) AND (i_units@5 = Cup OR i_units@5 = Dram) AND (i_size@3 = N/A OR i_size@3 = small)) OR i_category@1 = Men AND (i_color@4 = orange OR i_color@4 = frosted) AND (i_units@5 = Each OR i_units@5 = Tbl) AND i_size@3 = petite OR i_category@1 = Men AND (i_color@4 = forest OR i_color@4 = ghost) AND (i_units@5 = Lb OR i_units@5 = Bundle) AND (i_size@3 = medium OR i_size@3 = extra large), projection=[2]
                                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_category@0 = Women as __common_expr_5, i_category@0 as i_category, i_manufact@1 as i_manufact, i_size@2 as i_size, i_color@3 as i_color, i_units@4 as i_units]

                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=6100805
--- memory ---
